title: Stepper component for multi-step flows
description: Horizontal and vertical Stepper with indicators, titles, and descriptions for checkout, onboarding, and wizards in React and Next.js.

og.title: Stepper · Zentauri UI
og.description: Stepper list pattern with active step styling and semantic list roles.

twitter.title: Stepper · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Stepper list pattern with active step styling and semantic list roles.

intro: Steppers show progress across ordered stages. Each StepperItem can surface an indicator, title, and supporting description while the root tracks the active index.

faqs.question: How is the active step determined?
faqs.answer: Pass activeStep as a zero-based index. Steps before the index render as complete, the matching index renders as current, and later steps render as upcoming.

faqs.question: Does the stepper use a real list element?
faqs.answer: The root uses role="list" with listitem roles on items so separators and layout can stay flexible without breaking list semantics.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Orientation switches between horizontal stacks for top-of-page flows and vertical stacks for side rails. Indicators default to numeric labels but accept custom content.
